gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the health metrics for all community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot is holding a clipboard, checking the health of code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot in a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot in a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
